concepts.title: Yinhun: Ghost Marriage
concepts.description: Ghost marriage practice in East Asian traditions; marriage to deceased individuals; incorporation of deceased into family structure; supernatural belief as kinship mechanism

concepts.title: Collective Psychosis Mechanism
concepts.description: Mechanisms of collective psychological phenomena; shared delusions; cultural amplification of psychological states; supernatural interpretation of psychological events

concepts.title: Ritual and Social Memory
concepts.description: Role of ritual in maintaining and transmitting social memory; ritual as knowledge preservation system; ceremonial reenactment as mnemonic device
